violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloths throughout the kitchen for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Wiping cloths were stored in the handwashing sink.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. A shallow pan of rice on the counter had an internal temperature of 60 F.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
